name: adjutant
description: Retro terminal dashboard for multi-agent orchestration with iOS companion app

scripts.build: npm run build:cli && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.start: npx concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run build:cli && node dist/cli/index.js init
scripts.doctor: npm run build:cli && node dist/cli/index.js doctor
scripts.upgrade: npm run build:cli && node dist/cli/index.js upgrade
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.test:coverage: cd backend && npm run test:coverage && cd ../frontend && npm run test:coverage
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd backend && npm run lint:fix && cd ../frontend && npm run lint:fix

author: lupusdei
